prereq.title: Missing prerequisites
prereq.desc: This app needs the following programs to work fully. Please install them and restart (or verify the paths on the Settings page).

factories.title: Factories — drop / click / create
factories.desc: Drop or click a drop zone to pick files and auto-convert+write; press + to author a compliant page in the editor.
factories.noSource: Active brain has no source — add one on the Brains page
factories.dropHint: Drop files, or click to choose
factories.empty: Drop files, click a drop zone, or press + on a factory to create.
factories.converting: Converting and writing (LLM structuring may take a few seconds)…
factories.syncNeedSource: ✗ Pick an active source on the Brains page first, so sync knows which repo to target
factories.editorEnriched: LLM added {n} wikilink(s) (linked names/companies shown above)
factories.editorNotEnriched: LLM disabled; names not auto-linked (saved as-is)
factories.editorFallback: ; empty title used a default filename — fill in title and re-save
factories.editorHint: On save: the LLM turns names you write into [[dir/name]] and uses the title: value as the filename.

inbox.title: inbox (quick note)
inbox.noGraphHint: inbox uses gbrain capture as notes; it's outside the knowledge-graph link whitelist (DIR_PATTERN), so it forms no edges with other pages.

auto.title: Auto (drop it, I'll sort it)
auto.hint: Drop any file, or click to choose

classify.confirmHint: These files could not be classified automatically — pick a factory for each:
classify.autoSummarySkipped: Auto-classified: {n} page(s) written ({skipped} unsupported file(s) skipped)

templates.concepts:

type: concept
title: ''
tags: [concept]

# 

Definition: .

Key points:
-

operations.title: Operations — GBrain CLI
operations.desc: Wraps gbrain commands and streams their output.
operations.askPlaceholder: Question for ask / think (think may use anchor:slug on a new line)
operations.empty: No output yet. Press a button above to run an operation.
operations.stepRebuild: ── Rebuild companies (scan people for Company/Org bullets) ──

ops.thinkDesc: multi-hop synthesis (optional anchor:slug on new line)

configView.title: Settings
configView.desc: GBrain's config.json is the source of truth; the system reads and uses it directly. Below you can inspect/edit it and this app's own settings.
configView.llmTitle: LLM endpoint resolution (used by factory structuring)
configView.rawLabel: config.json (file-plane edit; provider_base_urls only takes effect here)
configView.homeOverrideLabel: GBRAIN_HOME override (parent of .gbrain; empty = default brain)
configView.autoSyncLabel: Auto commit + sync after factory write
configView.noPullLabel: Add --no-pull to sync (recommended for brains with no remote)

brainsView.title: Brains
brainsView.noSources: No sources. Press “Add source” to register a git repo.
brainsView.selectPrompt: Select a brain on the left.
brainsView.needSourceFields: Source id and git repo path are required

factory.peopleSummary: CSV rows: {rows}　merged groups: {merged}　people pages written: {written}
factory.companiesRebuiltClean: people={people}　distinct companies={distinct}　links={links}　frozen(enriched)={frozen}　--clean removed={removed}

source.notGitRepo: Source path is not a git repo (.git not found): {path}

brain.needPath: A brain path is required (parent of .gbrain)
brain.notABrain: This path is not a gbrain brain ({path} not found): {home}
brain.cannotRemoveDefault: The default brain cannot be removed

config.badChatModel: chat_model is not in provider:model format: {chatModel}
config.unknownProvider: Unknown provider with no provider_base_urls override: {provider}

llm.noApiKey: LLM provider {provider} is missing its API key (set env var {envKey} and retry)

gbrain.exeNotFound: gbrain executable not found: {path} (fix the gbrain.exe path on the Settings page)

git.hint: Version control; needed to git commit before sync after a factory write.

bun.hint: JS runtime; gbrain is installed and run via bun.

gbrain.hint: GBrain CLI (knowledge-graph engine); install via bun, see the ‘CLI standalone’ section.
